ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula: OR( AND( CONTAINER_Product_Type__c = 'NT', NOT(ISBLANK(ActivatedDate)),NOT($Permission.CONTAINER_Bypass_Validation_Rule), OR( ISBLANK(CONTAINER_PO_Number__c), ISBLANK(CONTAINER_Ship_Date__c), ISBLANK(CONTAINER_Ship_To_Destination__c), ISBLANK(TEXT(CONTAINER_SO_Category__c)) )), AND( CONTAINER_Product_Type__c = 'GENSET', NOT(ISBLANK(ActivatedDate)),NOT($Permission.CONTAINER_Bypass_Validation_Rule), OR( ISBLANK(CONTAINER_PO_Number__c), ISBLANK(CONTAINER_Ship_Date__c), ISBLANK(CONTAINER_Ship_To_Destination__c), ISBLANK(TEXT(CONTAINER_SO_GENSET_Category__c)) )) )
ValidationRule.errorMessage: Customer PO, Ship Date, Ship to Destination & SO Category fields cannot be blank.
